who: CFOs of small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For CFOs of small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We simplify cash flow forecasting instead of manual cash flow forecasting using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for CFOs seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow issues
DM outreach to CFOs with a demo video
Participate in forums where CFOs share tools
try_it: Let users try weekly cash flow report generation and email summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
